title: Software Developer Intern
html:
• Building and shipping full-stack features across frontend (React) and backend (Node.js, Express) in a fast-paced remote environment
  • Developing reusable, responsive UI components and scalable REST APIs that serve production traffic
  • Identifying and resolving performance bottlenecks, improving page load times and API response efficiency
  • Conducting code reviews and refactoring legacy modules to improve maintainability and reduce technical debt

title: Frontend Developer Intern
html:
• Gained hands-on experience building responsive and intuitive web interfaces using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
  • Collaborated with senior developers to enhance user experiences across various devices
  • Contributed to implementing features that ensured seamless functionality and cross-device compatibility
  • Developed and maintained front-end components following modern web development best practices
